episodes.title: The Dark Side of Yoga: Cults, Tantra & Mind Control
episodes.description:
Jay Dyer reacts to viral clips of Hasan Piker, accuses him of acting as an establishment mouthpiece, and breaks down what he sees as contradictions, scripted talking points, and fake revolutionary branding.

episodes.title: Jay and Ex-Member Expose the Truth About the Local Churches Cult
episodes.description:
Full Stream Link ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WY_ExFd0olQ

Jay Dyer speaks with a former member of the “Local Churches” movement founded by Witness Lee, a disciple of Watchman Nee, exposing its “one city, one church” doctrine and its roots in John Nelson Darby–influenced dispensationalism
